---
<!-- walkthrough_start -->

## Walkthrough

This PR introduces a health system module to the codogotchi engine. The new `health.ts` file defines `ProfileHealth` and `HealthConfig` types, along with a `DEFAULT_HEALTH_CONFIG` constant. The core `tickHealth` function updates profile health state based on activity signals, applying decay rules that respect weekends, grace periods, and vacation windows. The module also exports utility functions for mapping HP to overlay buckets and detecting weekends in specified timezones. The health module is re-exported from the engine package entrypoint. A comprehensive test suite validates boundary conditions for HP buckets, weekend skipping with timezone correctness, grace period exclusivity, vacation suspension/resumption, decay accumulation leading to death state, revival mechanics, activity signal tracking, and multi-day integration scenarios.

<!-- walkthrough_end -->
